about.name: Sono Lara
about.bio:
Hi! I'm Lara, a native Italian teacher and language enthusiast.

I hold a Bachelor's degree in Linguistic and Cultural Mediation, a Master's degree in Languages and Cultures for Communication and International Cooperation, and a Master's in Interpreting - all driven by my passion for languages and intercultural communication.

I've studied, lived and worked abroad, including in the UK and Russia.

painPoints.heading: Learn Italian with a Native Italian Teacher
questions: Planning a trip or moving to Italy?
Dreaming of having real conversations in Italian?
Do you want to understand Italians beyond the textbook?

items.title: Speak from Day One

items.title: Interactive & Fun
items.description: Games, activities, and engaging tasks that make learning enjoyable.

items.title: Authentic Italian

items.title: Conversation-Based
items.description: Talk about a wide range of topics and build confidence naturally.

items.title: Italian for Real Life
items.description: Practice the language you'll actualy use in everyday situations.

method.section:
Interactive lessons with guided conversations, activities, and games to start using Italian from day one.

**Why they work:**

1. I don't focus on correcting 'mistakes'; instead I guide you step by step.
2. You will learn to correct yourself naturally. building confidence and becoming more independent.
3. Interactive, engaging, and personalized lessons.
4. If needed, I can also explain complex concepts in English, French, or Russian.

results.beginner: **Starting from zero?** In few months you'll be able to handle many everyday situations, ask directions, express needs, desires and simple opinions.

contact.heading: Get in touch
contact.successMessage: Thanks! I'll get back to you soon.
